hero.question: Ethereum all time high by December 31, 2026?
hero.prob_take: Nineteen and a half percent odds price in roughly a 4.5x rally from current levels by end of 2026, which assumes Ethereum either breaks decisively above $5,100 or the market gets absolutely decimated and reprices entirely. The crowd's pessimism here looks justified given macro headwinds and Bitcoin dominance, but you're getting paid 5-to-1 on a scenario where Ethereum's core narrative (rollup scalability, institutional adoption) actually delivers.

daily_take.headline: Ethereum ATH Bet Crumbles as Macro Headwinds Bite. Smart Money Disagrees.
daily_take.deck: ETH's all-time high odds collapsed 3.5 points to 19.5% in 24 hours, signaling panic over Bitcoin weakness and macro uncertainty heading into 2026. But here's the thing: the market is pricing in a binary outcome when crypto cycles don't work that way. At 19.5%, you're getting 4.1-to-1 odds on an asset that needs roughly 200% upside from here. That's actually not insane if you believe the Fed pivots in 2025 or institutional adoption accelerates. Contrarian thesis: this dip creates value for patient capital with a 22-month runway.
